title: polygala integra
intro: Polygala integra, also known as the Small Twotone or Chinese Polygala, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the milkwort family. Traditionally, Polygala integra has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to tonify the kidney and liver, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polygala integra include its potential to improve kidney function, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala integra is often used in combination with other herbs to create tonifying formulas that are taken in the form of capsules, tablets, or decoctions.
